headline: 把 GitHub 上分散的 AI 开源信号整理成一份适合每天快速浏览的精选清单。
summary: 系统会优先选择最近仍在活跃推进、定位清晰、不是资源集合类噪音仓库的 AI 开源项目，并提供中文摘要、标签和推荐理由。

projects.name: OpenSandbox
projects.description: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.
projects.summaryZh: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: MaxKB
projects.description: 🔥 MaxKB is an open-source platform for building enterprise-grade agents.  强大易用的开源企业级智能体平台。
projects.summaryZh: 🔥 MaxKB is an open-source platform for building enterprise-grade agents.  强大易用的开源企业级智能体平台。 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: milvus
projects.description: Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search
projects.summaryZh: Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。

projects.name: hamilton
projects.description: Apache Hamilton helps data scientists and engineers define testable, modular, self-documenting dataflows, that encode lineage/tracing and metadata. Runs and scales everywhere python does.
projects.summaryZh: Apache Hamilton helps data scientists and engineers define testable, modular, self-documenting dataflows, that encode lineage/tracing and metadata. Runs and scales everywhere python does. 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。

projects.name: sglang
projects.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
projects.summaryZh: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: vllm-omni
projects.description: A framework for efficient model inference with omni-modality models
projects.summaryZh: A framework for efficient model inference with omni-modality models 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做多模态体验、视觉应用和创作工具的团队。

projects.name: inference
projects.description: Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API.
projects.summaryZh: Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API. 它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做 AI Coding、代码审核、开发提效产品的团队。

projects.name: Mooncake
projects.description: Mooncake is the serving platform for Kimi, a leading LLM service provided by Moonshot AI.
projects.summaryZh: Mooncake is the serving platform for Kimi, a leading LLM service provided by Moonshot AI. 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
